# Scout Monitoring

> Scout Monitoring provides error monitoring, log management, and application performance monitoring (APM) for Ruby, Python, PHP, and Elixir applications. We help development teams find and fix performance issues before they impact users.

## About

Scout Monitoring is a developer-focused observability platform. Our tools provide code-level visibility into application performance, including request tracing, query analysis, error tracking, and log management. We support Ruby on Rails, Django, Flask, FastAPI, Laravel, Phoenix, and other popular frameworks.

## Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)

- Small-to-medium engineering teams (2-50 developers)
- Teams running Ruby, Python, PHP, or Elixir web applications
- Organizations seeking a simpler alternative to complex enterprise APM tools (Datadog, New Relic)
- Development teams that value quick setup (under 5 minutes) and actionable insights
- Companies running on cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Heroku, etc.)

## Key Use Cases

- Identifying slow database queries and N+1 query patterns
- Tracing request performance across application layers
- Monitoring error rates and debugging exceptions in context
- Analyzing log data alongside performance metrics
- Alerting on performance regressions before users are affected
- Tracking deploy impact on application performance

## Core Products

- [App Traces](https://www.scoutapm.com/features/app-traces/): Code-level request tracing
- [App Metrics](https://www.scoutapm.com/features/app-metrics/): Real-time performance dashboards
- [Query Analysis](https://www.scoutapm.com/features/query-analysis/): Database query monitoring and N+1 detection
- [Log Management](https://www.scoutapm.com/features/log-management/): Unified log viewing with performance context
- [Error Monitoring](https://www.scoutapm.com/features/error-monitoring/): Integrated error tracking with APM data
- [Alerting](https://www.scoutapm.com/features/alerting/): Custom performance alert thresholds
- [MCP Server](https://www.scoutapm.com/mcp/): AI-native integration for code assistants

## Language Agents

- [Ruby Monitoring](https://www.scoutapm.com/ruby-monitoring/): Rails, Sinatra, Sidekiq
- [Python Monitoring](https://www.scoutapm.com/python-monitoring/): Django, Flask, FastAPI
- [PHP Monitoring](https://www.scoutapm.com/php-monitoring/): Laravel, Symfony
- [Elixir Monitoring](https://www.scoutapm.com/elixir-phoenix-monitoring/): Phoenix, LiveView
